name: ts-for-gir
description: Typescript .d.ts generator from GIR for gjs

scripts.build: yarn build:app && yarn build:types && yarn build:examples && yarn build:json && yarn build:doc
scripts.publish:app: yarn build:app && yarn workspaces foreach -v --all --parallel --no-private --include '@ts-for-gir/*' --include '@gi.ts/*' npm publish --tolerate-republish --tag latest --access public --provenance
scripts.publish:types: yarn workspaces foreach -v --all --parallel --no-private --include '@girs/*' npm publish --tolerate-republish --tag latest --access public
scripts.test:examples: yarn build:examples && yarn check:examples && yarn test:examples:cli
scripts.test:examples:cli: yarn workspace @ts-for-gir-example/glib-2-spawn-command-example run start && yarn workspace @ts-for-gir-example/gio-2-cat-example run start && yarn workspace @ts-for-gir-example/gobject-param-spec run start && yarn workspace @ts-for-gir-example/gio-2-async run start && yarn workspace @ts-for-gir-example/gio-2-action-entries run start && yarn workspace @ts-for-gir-example/gio-2-iterate run start
scripts.test:e2e: yarn build:app && yarn build:app:gjs && yarn workspace @ts-for-gir-test/e2e run test
scripts.test: yarn build && yarn test:types && yarn test:examples && yarn test:tests

author: Pascal Garber <pascal@mailfreun.de>

resolutions._comment_typescript: Pin types-dev's `typescript@*` devDep to 5.9. The lockfile regen for rc.10 deduplicated `typescript@*` onto `typescript@^6.0.3`, which surfaces three latent TS6-strictness errors in pre-existing generated d.ts (TS1540 module keyword, TS2416 get_toplevel signature, TS2320 duplicate ConstructorProps extends). They predate this PR and need follow-up generator fixes; pinning matches what main's lockfile resolved before the rc.10 bump. Workspace's own `typescript@^6.0.3` toolchain is unaffected.
